title: The Best of Seoul Korea Experience – Cherry Blossom Season 2026
details: Experience Korea at its most beautiful during cherry blossom season. Highlights include Seokchon Lake, Nami Island, Making Chicken Experience, Everland Theme Park, Youido Cherry Blossom Park, Hanbok Experience at Gyeongbokgung Palace, N Seoul Tower, and Eunpyeong Hanok Village.
flyer: assets/data/packages/korea_japan/Cherry Blossoms & Spring Holidays in Korea 2026/Flyer_1770016901.png

itinerary.day_details: Arrival at Incheon International Airport. Meet with tour guide, transfer to hotel, and hotel check-in. Flight: MNL–ICN 5J188 (07:35PM–12:45AM). Overnight in Incheon.
Visit Begonia Bird Park, Nami Island (Winter Sonata filming location), and Seongsu Café Street (coffee at own expense). Transfer to Seoul hotel for check-in.

Visit Starfield Byulmadang Library, Seokchon Lake Cherry Blossom Park, Making Chicken Experience with lunch (DIY chicken & rice), and Everland Theme Park (unlimited ride ticket). Transfer back to hotel.

itinerary.day_title: Day 4: Seoul Heritage & Cherry Blossom Tour (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Visit Ginseng Outlet, Cosmetic Duty Free, Hanbok experience at Gyeongbokgung Palace, Gwanghwamun Square, Youido Cherry Blossom Park, Dongdaemun, and Myeongdong Shopping Street. Overnight in Seoul.

Visit Red Pine Tree Shop, Amethyst Factory, Shinsegae Duty Free, N Seoul Tower (round-trip cable car only), and Eunpyeong Hanok Village. Transfer to Incheon Airport for departure. Flight: ICN–MNL 5J187 (02:15AM–05:40AM). Home sweet home!

inclusions: Full-board meals as per itinerary (4 breakfasts, 4 lunches, 4 dinners)
Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Private premium coach for all transfers
exclusions: Tip for local guide: $5/pax/day (collected in Manila, total $25)
extra_details: Mode of Payment: ₱15,000 per person (non-refundable) down payment to guarantee reservation. Full payment 45 days before travel date.
Itinerary is subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
Cherry blossom viewing is subject to weather conditions.
